questions.question: Explain the concept of function templates in C++ with an example.
keyPoints: Definition of function template as a blueprint for generic functions
Syntax using template<typename T>
Example showing swap or max function working with multiple types
Mention of compile-time instantiation

questions.question: What is template argument deduction? How does it work?
keyPoints: Definition of argument deduction
Process where compiler infers template parameters from function arguments
Example showing how T is deduced from argument types
Mention of explicit specification as alternative

questions.question: Differentiate between function overloading and function templates.
keyPoints: Function overloading requires explicit multiple function definitions
Function templates use single definition for multiple types
Template provides automatic code generation
Comparison table or examples showing both approaches

questions.question: What is SFINAE? Explain its significance in template programming.
keyPoints: Full form: Substitution Failure Is Not An Error
Compiler tries template substitutions, discards failures silently
Enables compile-time polymorphism and type checking
Example of enable_if or type_traits usage

questions.question: Write a function template to find the maximum element in an array. Also explain how it handles different data types.
keyPoints: Template definition with type parameter
Array parameter and size as non-type parameter
Comparison logic in function body
Automatic handling of int, float, double, etc.

questions.question: Explain template specialization with an example.
keyPoints: Definition: providing custom implementation for specific types
Syntax for full specialization
Example showing specialized version for char* or specific type
When to use vs primary template

questions.question: What are non-type template parameters? Give an example where they are useful.
keyPoints: Definition: parameters representing values not types
Common examples: int, pointer, reference types
Array size example: template<int N> class FixedArray
Benefits of compile-time constants

questions.question: Explain the various forms of template specialization in C++ with suitable code examples.
keyPoints: Primary template definition
Full specialization for specific type with complete override
Partial specialization (for class templates only) with partial type specification
Code examples showing syntax and usage scenarios
Comparison of when to use each form

questions.question: Discuss the template argument deduction process in detail. What are the rules that govern it and what are its limitations?
keyPoints: How compiler deduces template parameters from arguments
Deduction rules for different parameter types (by value, by reference)
Deduction from multiple arguments
Explicit specification vs deduction
Scenarios causing deduction failure and ambiguity
Ways to guide deduction: std::decay, std::forward

questions.question: Write a comprehensive C++ program demonstrating the use of function templates for arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide) that work with built-in numeric types. Include proper error handling for division by zero.
keyPoints: Template functions for each arithmetic operation
Function overloading or specialization for specific types
Division function with zero-check logic
Demonstration with int, float, double examples
Output showing correct results for different types

questions.question: Explain the concept of variadic templates in C++. Write a function template that can accept variable number of arguments and compute their sum.
keyPoints: Introduction to variadic templates and parameter packs
Syntax using ... (ellipsis)
Recursive or fold expression approach for processing arguments
Complete example showing sum of heterogeneous types
Explanation of base case and recursive case
